headline: Seagate Technology to Report Fiscal Third Quarter 2026 Financial Results on April 28, 2026
summary: SINGAPORE, April 14, 2026--Seagate Technology Holdings plc (NASDAQ: STX), a leading innovator of mass-capacity data storage, will report fiscal third quarter 2026 financial results after the US market closes on Tuesday, April 28, 2026. The investment community conference call to discuss these results will take place that day at 2:00 PM PT / 5:00 PM ET.

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Seagate (STX) After Its Rapid Share Price Surge?
summary: Wondering if Seagate Technology Holdings at around US$513 per share still stacks up as good value, or if the easy gains are already behind it? This article walks through what the current price might mean for you. The stock has seen sharp moves recently, with returns of 13.2% over 7 days, 33.8% over 30 days and 78.5% year to date, on top of very large gains over 1, 3 and 5 years that are all above 6x. Recent coverage has focused on Seagate as a key player in hard drives and storage for data...

headline: Nvidia's AI Reign Under Threat: These 4 Memory Stocks Are Now Leading The Chip Rally
summary: Memory stocks have crushed Nvidia since mid-2025. Here's why SanDisk, Western Digital, Seagate and Micron are now leading the semiconductor rally.

headline: Hormuz Crisis Triggers Chipmakers' Best Rally Since 2002: 9 Stocks Gaining Up To 60% Since The War Began
summary: Semiconductors are the surprise winners of the Iran war. The SOXX ETF has risen for 10 straight sessions — its longest streak since 2017 — as chipmakers rally up to 60%.
